name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 第二边界
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 第二边界
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. These Dual Berettas have been painted gunmetal grey. The grips have been painted a plum-colored purple. Table for two?
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把双持贝瑞塔采用枪灰色进行涂装，握把为乌梅紫色。 双人桌？
